News

  • Introducing OpenAI o3-mini

    Today we are releasing OpenAI o3-mini, our most cost-efficient reasoning model.

    January 31, 2025

  • Introducing Operator

    Operator is an agent that can go to the web to perform tasks for you.

    January 23, 2025

  • Learning to reason with LLMs

    We are introducing OpenAI o1, a new large language model trained with reinforcement learning.

    September 12, 2024

  • Hello GPT-4o

    GPT-4o is our new flagship model that can reason across audio, vision, and text in real time.

    May 13, 2024

  • Sora: Creating video from text

    We are teaching AI to understand and simulate the physical world in motion.

    February 15, 2024
